summary: CRITICAL: Workflow violates explicit requirements. Missing entire test harness—no test fixtures, no act-result.txt artifact, no validation via act. Requirements state 'Every single test case must execute through the GitHub Actions workflow via act' and 'act-result.txt file MUST exist when done,' neither implemented. Workflow just runs script once without testing. Action refs unpinned to SHAs (best_practices violation: 'pinned action refs' required). Error handling fragile: continue-on-error + outcome check (lines 14-20) doesn't properly fail workflow. Script itself decent (good types, error handling), but workflow+script integration incomplete. Would NOT ship.
